'''T-12''' was a [[Service droid/Legends|service droid]] used by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to catalog [[Naddist]] [[Sith artifact/Legends|artifacts]] being shipped to [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] following the [[Freedon Nadd Uprising]]. During the [[Conclave at Deneba]], T-12 was present, assisting [[Cay Qel-Droma]] and the other Jedi. When the [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] [[Battle of Deneba|attacked]] [[Deneba/Legends|Deneba]] during the conclave, T-12 was one of the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] subjected to the Krath programming trap, thus turning T-12 from a humble servant droid into a deadly assassin.

==Appearances==
